steps.t: Cured pork and hearty vegetables can be found at the feast hall in Vérnozal. You should collect cured pork and hearty vegetables.
An oven can be found at the feast hall in Vérnozal. You should cook shchi for dwarf explorers at the oven.
Dwarf explorers can be found in Vérnozal. You should give the shchi you cooked to the dwarf explorers.
Rúzat can be found at Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rúzat.
